title: Team check-in
description: An individual's update to their team within the ground-level coordination loop. Captures intentions, progress, and blockers to keep teammates in sync day-to-day or week-to-week.

id.description: Unique identifier for this team check-in.

membership_ids.description: IDs of the memberships this team check-in is for. Each membership encodes both the person and the team, ensuring the person belongs to every referenced team.

date.description: The date this team check-in covers (ISO 8601).

next.description: Intentions - what this person plans to work on. Communicating intent is a core practice: it lets leaders course-correct early and lets contributors drive progress autonomously.

previously.description: Progress - what this person accomplished since their last team check-in.

blockers.description: Anything preventing forward progress that needs attention from the team or leadership.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this team check-in was submitted (ISO 8601).
